description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the stages compose and documentation. Add a build_image job that runs in the compose stage, uses the docker:git Docker image with the docker:dind service, and is limited to the master branch (only: - master). In its script, run `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, then `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/ognarb/docugen .`, and finally `docker push registry.gitlab.com/ognarb/docugen:latest`. No caches, artifacts, or variables are defined.
